applications

Points to the coreutils application exempla workspace.

Syntax:

Category

application

Related

  • cli
  • argumenta
  • operandus
  • exitus

Examples

examples/corpus/applications/coreutils.fab (canonical · pointer)

Points to the coreutils application exempla workspace.

# Coreutils application exempla live outside the syntax corpus.
#
# See examples/coreutils/ and docs/factory/coreutils/CAMPAIGN.md.

incipit {
    nota "coreutils application exempla"
}

Expected output:

coreutils application exempla
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/applications/coreutils.fab"]
